zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll於1415年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾時，她的父親Prince Maelruana O"Carroll of Éile33歲，母親Catherine Kate O'Reilly20歲。她於1434年與Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1506年4月15日在愛爾蘭庫迪 奧法利可隆馬可諾享年91歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 奧法利可隆馬可諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll于1415年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾时，她的父亲Prince Maelruana O"Carroll of Éile33岁，母亲Catherine Kate O'Reilly20岁。她于1434年与Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1506年4月15日在爱尔兰庫迪 奧法利可隆馬可諾享年91岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 奧法利可隆馬可諾。

nameMeanings.name: O'Carroll
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Cian, Cormac, Fergus, Finbarr, James Patrick, Jarlath, John Patrick, Sinead, Siobhan.
Irish (Dublin and Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cearbhaill ‘descendant of Cearbhall’ (see Carroll ).

variants.name: Carroll
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill ‘descendant (or son) of Cearbhall’, a personal name perhaps based on cearbh ‘hacking’ and hence originally a byname for a butcher or a fierce warrior.
English and Scottish: variant of   Carrell  .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathryn

variants.name: Catharine

nameMeanings.name: Kavanaugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Oonagh.

variants.name: Kavanagh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Aileen, Brendan, Cathal, Conor, Eamon, Keelin, Liam, Michael Sean, Niall, Ronan, Sean Patrick.

Irish: from Caomhánach, an adjectival epithet meaning ‘belonging to (Saint) Caomhán’, whose personal name means ‘little beautiful one’. Etymologically, the first part of the name is the same as that in Kevin .

History: The first known bearer of the epithet was Domhnall Caomhánach (Donal Kavanagh, died in 1175), the son of Diarmait Mac Murchadha (Dermot McMurrough), king of Leinster in the 12th century. Despite being killed at an early age, Domhnall Caomhánach gave his name to a large and important family in Irish history.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll was born in 1415, in County Clare, Ireland, her father, Prince Maelruana O"Carroll of Éile, was 33 and her mother, Catherine Kate O'Reilly, was 20. She married Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter in 1434, in County Kilkenny, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 15 April 1506, in Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Ireland, at the age of 91, and was buried in Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll est née en 1415, à County Clare, Irlande, son père, Prince Maelruana O"Carroll of Éile, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Catherine Kate O'Reilly, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter en 1434, à County Kilkenny, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 avril 1506, à Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlande, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll 1415 in County Clare, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Prince Maelruana O"Carroll of Éile 33 und ihre Mutter Catherine Kate O'Reilly 20. Sie hat 1434 in County Kilkenny, Irland Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. April 1506 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irland und wurde in Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll è nata il nel 1415 nel County Clare, Irlanda, sua padre, Prince Maelruana O"Carroll of Éile, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Catherine Kate O'Reilly, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter nel 1434, nel County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 15 aprile 1506, nel Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlanda, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolta a Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carrollが1415年にアイルランドコウントイ クラーで生まれた時，父Prince Maelruana O"Carroll of Éileは33歳，母Catherine Kate O'Reillyは20歳であった。1434年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーでSir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1506年4月15日にアイルランドコウントイ オファリークロンマクノイゼで91歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ オファリークロンマクノイゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll(이)가 1415년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Prince Maelruana O"Carroll of Éile(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Kate O'Reilly(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1434년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이에서 Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1506년 4월 15일 아일랜드 카운티 파리 클론마c노이스에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 파리 클론마c노이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll nasceu em 1415, em County Clare, Irlanda, seu pai, Prince Maelruana O"Carroll of Éile, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Kate O'Reilly, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter em 1434, em County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de abril de 1506, em Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlanda, com 91 anos, e foi sepultada em Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll родилась в 1415 г. в местности коунти клар, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Prince Maelruana O"Carroll of Éile было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Kate O'Reilly, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter в 1434 г. в местности коунти килкенни, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 15 апреля 1506 г. в местности клонмакноис, коунти оффали, Ирландия в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности клонмакноис, коунти оффали, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll nació en 1415, en County Clare, Irlanda, su papá, Prince Maelruana O"Carroll of Éile, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Catherine Kate O'Reilly, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter en 1434, en County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 15 de abril de 1506, en Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlanda, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultada en Clonmacnoise, County Offaly, Irlanda.
